name: Mushroom Bacon Saute (Master Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use this recipe to add to salads, pasta, rice, pizza, meats, etc.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook bacon until crisp, about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer the cooked bacon to a paper towel and crumble; set aside.
4. Pour off all but 4 tablespoons of bacon fat.
5. Add mushrooms, onions, and garlic to the skillet; cook, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid evaporates, 7 to 8 minutes.
6. Stir in the crumbled bacon, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
7. Refrigerate or freeze the mixture in two portions for later use in recipes.
